message:
🐛 Fix deployment capabilities for unreachable clusters and health check gauge (#4139, #4131) (#4146)

Mark unreachable clusters (GetNodes fails) and clusters with zero nodes
as available=false in /api/workloads/capabilities. Previously all
clusters were unconditionally marked available=true, letting users
select invalid deployment targets.

Replace the full-circle health score in the AI Health Check card with
a horseshoe gauge for clearer visual communication.

Fixes #4139
Fixes #4131

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
